textByHash.2560765ce708e70a583017589d153d0d507c12ac: Eh? What are you on about? Go away!
textByHash.75362ef60dc7096cb6a92d58391bafc59fec14a7: Hi. I'm a little busy right now.
textByHash.a29f95c0b8dcb71ecd4da6f1ac4654756a150d3a: Eh? Don't be daft! We don't even HAVE any hedges!
textByHash.ce542819bd3ebbfb9c59fbc0d67fbc273a6d2c6d: Oh, you're one of the gang are you? Ok, hold up a second, I'll just let you in through here.
